title: SkillsMP scout integration
description: Added safe SkillsMP scout script, generated candidate review queue, documented command in TOOLS.md, and logged daily note. Integration is discovery-only with no auto-install path.

title: SkillsMP scout hardened after Opus review
description: Changed SkillsMP integration from candidate adoption scout to pattern-intelligence only: stricter min-star default, duplicate suppression, PATTERN ONLY recommendations, explicit no-install framing, and updated TOOLS guidance.

title: AI agent opportunity thread signals integrated
description: Persisted durable signals from the X thread: joke vertical filter, orchestration layer thesis, agent referral networks, source-closing defensibility, and agent-readable distribution surfaces.

title: Agent Operations Layer offer and vertical filter added
description: Created Agent Operations Layer Audit offer artifact, joke-vertical AI validation filter, and focused Mission Control tasks to turn the X opportunity thread into consulting/content assets.

title: CER decision filter added
description: Added Compounding Energy Return as a qualitative North Star decision filter for prioritizing work that compounds energy, leverage, proof, relationships, and optionality without creating fake metric overhead.

title: CER wired into North Star rubric
description: Updated North Star weekly rubric so CER affects lane scoring, overinvestment guardrails, and required weekly output with one high-CER priority and one low-CER stop/defer decision.

title: Everyday business AI adoption signal integrated
description: Updated Agent Operations Layer Audit and joke-vertical AI filter to reflect OpenAI signal that entrepreneurial AI adoption is mostly outside tech startups and should be positioned around everyday operators already using AI informally.

title: Implementation Intelligence System blueprint created
description: Created a strategic blueprint and Mission Control build tasks for a compounding AI implementation delivery system: workflow discovery, governance/risk, pattern library, testing, handoff, post-launch learning, objections, and vertical scouting.

title: xhigh Implementation Intelligence correction applied
description: Patched the consulting implementation blueprint after xhigh review: added Workflow Case File Phase 0, created the case-file template and redaction protocol, added Phase 0 MC task, and demoted standalone agent tasks behind validation.
